entities.name: Hiring Market Fragmentation
entities.context: Core insight that centralized job boards are ending and hiring is splitting into internal tools, referrals, niche platforms, and recruiters

entities.name: Careerspan
entities.context: V's company; a niche platform for specialized sourcing using story-based matching

entities.name: FOHE
entities.context: Organization/community that partners with Careerspan, provides trust and curation advantage

entities.name: Internal tools
entities.context: Hiring channel employers prefer; part of market fragmentation

entities.name: Referrals
entities.context: Highest quality hiring channel but limited supply

entities.name: Niche platforms
entities.context: Specialized sourcing category in fragmented hiring market

entities.name: Recruiters
entities.context: Expensive hiring channel with declining market share

entities.name: Curator advantage
entities.context: Competitive advantage from FOHE trust and curation

entities.name: Matching advantage
entities.context: Story-based matching vs traditional resume-based matching

entities.name: Outcome focus
entities.context: Success measured by placements rather than clicks

entities.name: Centralized job boards
entities.context: Legacy hiring model that is ending

entities.name: Specialized sourcing channel
entities.context: What Careerspan aims to become; preferred by employers because it works

relationships.context: Internal tools are one of four fragments of the hiring market
